title: Survival Pro
description: A mod with QoL features that improve the survival experience.
body:
A mod adding QoL features for the survival experience.

## Features:
- Vein Mining: Automatically mine ores and logs that are next to the block you mined. V1.0.0+
- Auto Smelt: When you pick up a raw ore it will automatically smelt it at the cost of 1 piece of coal. V1.0.0+
- Telepathy: When you mine an ore it will teleport the items to you. 1.1.0+
- Extremely Configurable: You can configure it however you like! Please use configured mod by MrCrayFish for forge (Link 1 and Link 2)

Alternative to Diggus Maximus and Falling Tree atm.

- Link 1: [Configured Forge](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/configured) 
- Link 2: [Configured Fabric](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/configured-fabric) 
- Also, you can use [forge config screens](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-screens)
